creator: bugg@bugg.strangled.net
text:
This issue was already fixed.
You need to obtain the newest Xbin.tgz and install it.

-Dan Papasian
<bugg@bugg.strangled.net>

On Fri, Feb 25, 2000 at 07:12:28PM -0800, Jin Guojun wrote:

<snip>
